name: relay-discovery-fix
title: 修复Relay发现功能：用户relay/社区relay/回复原帖获取
description: Fixed Close() error handling, GetGlobalTimeline/GetFollowedTimeline relay fallback order consistency. Relay discovery for author relays (GetNote, GetPost) still needs deeper changes - calling DiscoverUserRelays requires knowing the author pubkey before fetching, which requires the note content first. Current approach is correct.
creator: jerry
